popupEmpty.description: Shown when no targets are configured

optionsHeading.description: Options page heading and page title

colKey.description: Table column header for target key

colActions.description: Table column header for action buttons

confirmReset.message: Reset all jump targets to defaults? This will remove any custom targets.
confirmReset.description: Confirmation message for reset to defaults

confirmImport.message: This will replace all current targets. Continue?

confirmDelete.description: Confirmation message for deleting a target

alertInvalidJsonObject.message: Invalid file: expected a JSON object.
alertInvalidJsonObject.description: Alert for invalid import file format

alertInvalidTarget.message: Invalid target for key "$KEY$": each value must have "url" and "description" strings.
alertInvalidTarget.description: Alert for invalid target in import file

validationUrlRequired.description: Validation error when URL is empty

validationUrlInvalid.message: URL must start with http:// or https://
validationUrlInvalid.description: Validation error when URL has wrong protocol

validationDescRequired.description: Validation error when description is empty

validationKeyRequired.description: Validation error when key is empty

validationKeyWhitespace.description: Validation error when key has spaces

errorNotLoaded.description: Error when trying to mutate before data is loaded

errorKeyExists.description: Error when adding a duplicate key

toastTargetAdded.description: Toast shown after adding a target

toastTargetUpdated.description: Toast shown after updating a target

toastTargetDeleted.description: Toast shown after deleting a target

toastResetSuccess.description: Toast shown after resetting to defaults

toastSaveFailed.message: Failed to save. Please try again.
toastSaveFailed.description: Toast shown when a storage save fails

onboardingIntro.message: Jump! lets you navigate to your favorite sites straight from the address bar.

onboardingStep1.message: Click the address bar (or press Ctrl+L / Cmd+L)

onboardingStep2.message: Type j and press Space or Tab

onboardingStep3.message: Type a shortcut (e.g. g) and press Enter

onboardingExample.message: Try it: j → Space → g → Enter opens GitHub

omniboxAvailable.description: Shows available shortcut keys in omnibox

omniboxNoMatch.message: No matching shortcut — press Enter to open settings
omniboxNoMatch.description: Shown in omnibox when no shortcut matches the input
